text: Blessed is the one who does not walk in step with the wicked or stand in the way that sinners take or sit in the company of mockers,
I lie down and sleep; I wake again, because the LORD sustains me.
In peace I will lie down and sleep, for you alone, LORD, make me dwell in safety.
LORD, our Lord, how majestic is your name in all the earth! You have set your glory in the heavens.
I will give thanks to you, LORD, with all my heart; I will tell of all your wonderful deeds.I will be glad and rejoice in you; I will sing the praises of your name, O Most High.
The LORD is a refuge for the oppressed, a stronghold in times of trouble. Those who know your name trust in you, for you, LORD, have never forsaken those who seek you.
For the LORD is righteous, he loves justice; the upright will see his face.
But I trust in your unfailing love; my heart rejoices in your salvation. I will sing the LORD's praise, for he has been good to me.
I keep my eyes always on the LORD. With him at my right hand, I will not be shaken.
Who can discern [his] errors? Clear thou me from hidden [faults].
From birth I was cast on you; from my mother's womb you have been my God.
For the Chief Musician. A Psalm of David. Jehovah answer thee in the day of trouble; The name of the God of Jacob set thee up on high
Surely you have granted him unending blessings and made him glad with the joy of your presence.
Surely God is my help; the Lord is the one who sustains me.
The Lord is my shepherd, I lack nothing.
The Lord is my light and my salvation—whom shall I fear?
Teach me your way, LORD; lead me in a straight path because of my oppressors.
The Lord is my strength and my shield; my heart trusts in him, and he helps me.
The Lord gives strength to his people; the Lord blesses his people with peace.
I sought the LORD, and he answered me; he delivered me from all my fears.
Then my soul will rejoice in the LORD and delight in his salvation.
For with you is the fountain of life; in your light we see light.
Commit your way to the LORD; trust in him and he will do this: He will make your righteous reward shine like the dawn, your vindication like the noonday sun.
But now, Lord, what do I look for? My hope is in you.
Send me your light and your faithful care, let them lead me; let them bring me to your holy mountain, to the place where you dwell.
God is our refuge and strength, an ever-present help in trouble.
He says, 'Be still, and know that I am God; I will be exalted among the nations, I will be exalted in the earth.'
For this God is our God for ever and ever; he will be our guide even to the end.
Those who sacrifice thank offerings honor me, and to the blameless I will show my salvation.

But I am like an olive tree flourishing in the house of God; I trust in God's unfailing love for ever and ever. For what you have done I will always praise you in the presence of your faithful people. And I will hope in your name, for your name is good.
Cast your cares on the Lord and he will sustain you; he will never let the righteous be shaken.
Since my youth, God, you have taught me, and to this day I declare your marvelous deeds.
Whoever dwells in the shelter of the Most High will rest in the shadow of the Almighty.
It is good to praise the LORD and make music to your name, O Most High, proclaiming your love in the morning and your faithfulness at night,
For the Lord is good and his love endures forever; his faithfulness continues through all generations.
Praise the LORD. Praise the LORD, you his servants; praise the name of the LORD.
The LORD has done it this very day; let us rejoice today and be glad.
For you created my inmost being; you knit me together in my mother's womb.
The Lord is near to all who call on him in truth.
